item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

  • AnderEnder/s3find-rsstars27 — A command line utility to walk an Amazon S3 hierarchy, an analog of find for Amazon S3
  • andschwa/rust-genetic-algorithmstars68 — A genetic algorithm for academic benchmark problems
  • cloudflare/boringtunstars3.2k — A Userspace WireGuard VPN Implementation
  • dlecan/generic-dns-updatestars10 — A tool to update DNS zonefiles with your IP address
  • Factotumstars161 — A system to programmatically run data pipelines
  • fcsonline/drillstars803 — A HTTP load testing application inspired by Ansible syntax
  • intecture/apistars29 — an API-driven server management and configuration tool
  • ivanceras/diwatastars386 — A database administration tool for postgresql
  • kbknapp/doclistars34 — A command line utility for managing DigitalOcean infrastructure
  • limonite — static blog/website generator
  • nicohman/eidolonstars85 — A steam and drm-free game registry and launcher for linux and macosx
  • Weldstars147 — Full fake REST API generator

    • Applications

    Audio and Music

  • indiscipline/zrtstrstars18 — A command line utility for checking if stereo wav files are faux-stereo (i.e. have identical channels) and converting such files to mono.
  • Lyriekstars13 — A multi-threaded GTK 3 application for fetching the lyrics of the current playing song.
  • Polarisstars676 — A music streaming application.

    • Applications

    Cryptocurrencies

  • coinbase-pro-rsstars81 — Coinbase pro client in Rust, supports sync/async/websocket
  • ethaddrgenstars86 — Custom Ethereum vanity address generator made in Rust
  • Parity-Bitcoinstars662 — The Parity Bitcoin client
  • wagyustars367 [wagyu] — Rust library for generating cryptocurrency wallets

    • Applications

    Database

  • indradb — Rust based graph database
  • noria — Dynamically changing, partially-stateful data-flow for web application backends
  • PumpkinDBstars1.2k — an event sourcing database engine
  • seppo0010/rsedisstars1.5k — A Redis reimplementation in Rust

    • Applications

    Games

  • lifthrasiir/angolmois-ruststars88 — A minimalistic music video game which supports the BMS format
  • cristicbz/rust-doomstars2k — A renderer for Doom, may progress to being a playable game
  • garkimasera/rusted-ruinsstars266 — Extensible open world rogue like game with pixel art
  • aleshaleksey/TGWMstars15 — An RPG with turned-based mechanics (work in progress)
  • ozkriff/zemerothstars950 — A small 2D turn-based hexagonal strategy game
  • Zone of Controlstars330 — A turn-based hexagonal strategy game

    • Applications

    Graphics

  • Limeth/eucliderstars157 — A real-time 4D CPU ray tracer
  • RazrFalcon/resvgstars1k — An SVG rendering library.
  • ivanceras/svgbobstars2.4k — converts ASCII diagrams into SVG graphics

  • thepowersgang/rust_osstars485 —

    Security tools

  • arvancloud/libinjection-rsstars25 — Rust bindings for libinjectionstars783
  • kpcyrd/rshijackstars300 — A TCP connection hijacker, rust rewrite of shijack
  • rustscan/rustscanstars4k — Make Nmap faster with this port scanning tool
  • kpcyrd/sniffgluestars673 — A secure multithreaded packet sniffer
  • kpcyrd/sn0intstars861 — A semi-automatic OSINT framework and package manager

    • Applications

    System tools

  • bandwhichstars6.3k — Terminal bandwidth utilization tool

  • buster/rrunstars94 — A command launcher for Linux, similar to gmrun

  • lotabout/rargsstars296 [rargs] — xargs + awk with pattern matching support

  • mitnk/cicadastars820 — A bash-like Unix shell
  • mmstick/tv-renamerstars134 — A tv series renaming application with an optional GTK3 frontend.

item.description:
Resources

  • Learning

    • awesome-rust-mentors — A list of helpful Rust mentors willing to take mentees and eductate them about Rust and programming.
    • Awesome Rust Streamingstars439 - A community curated list of livestreams about Rust.
    • exercism.io — programming exercises that help you learn new concepts in Rust.
    • Idiomatic Ruststars2.5k — A peer-reviewed collection of articles/talks/repos which teach idiomatic Rust.
    • Learning Rust With Entirely Too Many Linked Lists — in-depth exploration of Rust's memory management rules, through implementing a few different types of list structures.
    • Rust by Example
    • Rust Cookbook — A collection of simple examples that demonstrate good practices to accomplish common programming tasks, using the crates of the Rust ecosystem.
    • Rust Online Courses at Classpert — A list of Rust online courses (paid) from Classpert Online Course Search
    • Rust for professionals — A quick introduction to Rust for experienced software developers.
    • Rust in Motion — A video series by Carol Nichols and Jake Goulding (paid)
    • rust-learningstars6.6k — A collection of useful resources to learn Rust
    • Rustlingsstars16.4k — small exercises to get you used to reading and writing Rust code
    • stdxstars1.4k — Learn these crates first as an extension to std
    • University of Pennsylvania's Comp Sci Rust Programming Course
    • Build a language VM
    • Code Playground - Interactively edit & play rust snippets on your iPhone and iPad devices.
    • Refactoring to Rust - A book that introduces to Rust language.

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust Jul 11th - Jul 17th, 2016
item.description:
Development tools

Build system

  • Cargo — the Rust package manager
    • cargo-benchcmp — A utility to compare Rust micro-benchmarks
    • cargo-bitbake — A cargo extension that can generate BitBake recipes utilizing the classes from meta-rust
    • cargo-cache — inspect/manage/clean your cargo cache (~/.cargo//${CARGO_HOME}), print sizes etc
    • cargo-check — A wrapper around cargo rustc -- -Zno-trans which can be helpful for running a faster compile if you only need correctness checks
    • cargo-count — lists source code counts and details about cargo projects, including unsafe statistics
    • cargo-deb — Generates binary Debian packages
    • cargo-deps — build dependency graphs of Rust projects
    • cargo-do — run multiple cargo commands in a row
    • cargo-ebuild — cargo extension that can generate ebuilds using the in-tree eclasses
    • cargo-edit — allows you to add and list dependencies by reading/writing to your Cargo.toml file from the command line
    • cargo-generatestars715 A generator of a rust project by leveraging a pre-existing git repository as a template.
    • cargo-get - Cargo plugin to easily query information from Cargo.toml files
    • cargo-graph — updated fork of cargo-dot with additional features. Unmaintained, see cargo-deps
    • cargo-info — queries crates.io for crates details from command line
    • cargo-license — A cargo subcommand to quickly view the licenses of all dependencies.
    • cargo-make — Rust task runner and build tool.
    • cargo-modules — A cargo plugin for showing a tree-like overview of a crate's modules.
    • cargo-multi — runs specified cargo command on multiple crates
    • cargo-outdated — displays when newer versions of Rust dependencies are available, or out of date
    • cargo-release — tool for releasing git-managed cargo project, build, tag, publish, doc and push
    • cargo-script — lets people quickly and easily run Rust "scripts" which can make use of Cargo's package ecosystem
    • cargo-testify — watches files changes, runs tests and notifies about the result with friendly OS notification
    • cargo-treestars538 – Cargo subcommand that visualizes a crate's dependency graph in a tree-like format
    • cargo-update — cargo subcommand for checking and applying updates to installed executables
    • cargo-watch — utility for cargo to compile projects when sources change
    • liuchong/cargo-xstars6 — A very simple third-party cargo subcommand to execute a custom command
    • dtolnay/cargo-expandstars955 — Expand macros in your source code
  • CMake
    • Devolutions/CMakeRuststars106 — useful for integrating a Rust library into a CMake project
    • SiegeLord/RustCMakestars94 — an example project showing usage of CMake with Rust

    • Libraries

    Compression

  • bzip2
    • alexcrichton/bzip2-rsstars53 — libbz2 bindings
  • miniz

  • tar
